duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; seedance2.0_vip image2video supports 4-15s
command_contract_reference: sources/Dreamina_CLI执行契约_V1.2_命令预检与网页CLI差异补丁.md
narrative_function: CLI-legal 4-second SHOT-02 action highlight source intended to build pressure before impact, reveal a giant spherical rain shockwave, and let the rain curtain sweep past the camera foreground; final edit should use strongest 1-2 seconds.
motion_policy: Preserve locked keyframe composition; hold impact with rain-particle build-up, trigger giant spherical rain shockwave from central contact point, pull back quickly to reveal scale, then let the outer shockwave edge pass the lens foreground without creating a second exchange.
camera_policy: Stable first second, brief micro-shake at shockwave start, stronger fast pull-back in third second, lens-foreground rain curtain pass in fourth second, then return to stability.

prior_attempt.remaining_issues: shockwave too small; scale does not reach visual distance; lacks pre-impact rain-particle build-up; camera pull-back not strong enough; shockwave edge does not sweep past camera foreground
prior_attempt.lesson_learned: strong trigger words should remain, but V006 must add pre-impact particle build-up and larger camera pull-back reveal

allowed_next_action: Only submit after explicit user approval for exactly one Dreamina image2video task after command-contract preflight.
